attempts.strategy: Forward map a ⊗ₜ[R] b ↦ a ⊗ₜ[S] b via TensorProduct.lift; inverse via S-linear TensorProduct.lift into an e.symm-base-changed R-tensor
attempts.code_tried: letI _iTR : Module S (TensorProduct R A B) := Module.compHom _ e.symm.toRingHom; refine LinearEquiv.ofLinear (TensorProduct.lift ...) ...
attempts.lean_error: failed to synthesize instance of type class SMulCommClass R S A (then CompatibleSMul R S A B)
attempts.insight: Building the inverse as an S-linear lift into a doubly-base-changed module triggers unsatisfiable SMulCommClass/CompatibleSMul synthesis. Dead end — recorded in task result.

attempts.strategy: Build inverse as an AddHom via TensorProduct.liftAddHom, then promote to R-linear by induction_on; map_smul' on fwd via `show`
attempts.code_tried: let bwdAdd := TensorProduct.liftAddHom {...} (fun s a b => by ... rw [hsa, hsb, TensorProduct.smul_tmul'])
attempts.lean_error: Tactic `rewrite` failed: Did not find an occurrence of the pattern ?r • ?m ⊗ₜ ?n in ... (e.symm s • a) ⊗ₜ[R] b = a ⊗ₜ[R] (e.symm s • b)
attempts.insight: smul_tmul' is the wrong direction; the scalar-swap goal needs TensorProduct.smul_tmul (move S-scalar across the tensor via e.symm).

attempts.strategy: Fix scalar-swap with `exact TensorProduct.smul_tmul _ _ _`; right-inverse via TensorProduct.ext'
attempts.code_tried: rw [hsa, hsb]; exact TensorProduct.smul_tmul _ _ _; ... refine LinearEquiv.ofLinear fwd bwd ?_ ?_ · refine TensorProduct.ext' fun a b => ?_ ...
attempts.lean_error: Tactic `rewrite` failed: Did not find an occurrence of the pattern fwd (bwd x) / fwd (?x + ?y) (in the induction add-case for the right inverse)
attempts.insight: Right inverse fwd∘bwd is R-linear over the S-tensor, so TensorProduct.ext' (expecting S-linearity) type-mismatches; must use LinearMap.ext + TensorProduct.induction_on, and the add case needs `rw [map_add bwd, map_add fwd, hx, hy]` (both maps' additivity).

attempts.strategy: Right inverse via LinearMap.ext + induction_on with explicit map_add on both maps; replace `show` with `change` for compHom-defeq scalar goals; add trailing `rfl` to the bwd R-linearity tmul case
attempts.code_tried: refine LinearMap.ext fun x => ?_; induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with | tmul a b => change fwd (a ⊗ₜ[R] b) = a ⊗ₜ[S] b; simp only [fwd, TensorProduct.lift.tmul, ...] | add x y hx hy => rw [map_add bwd, map_add fwd, hx, hy]; ... | tmul a b => rw [TensorProduct.smul_tmul']; change (e r • a) ⊗ₜ[R] b = r • (a ⊗ₜ[R] b); rw [TensorProduct.smul_tmul']; rfl
attempts.insight: GREEN. lean_verify: axioms = [propext, Quot.sound], no sorryAx. The AddHom-inverse + induction_on round-trips + change-over-show are the working pattern; full recipe in PROJECT_STATUS KB.
